name: Kentucky Bourbon Pecan Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 Jars Red glazed cherries, finely chopped (8 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two loaf pans (9 x 5 x 3 inches).
2. In a large mixing bowl, thoroughly beat the butter with 2 cups of sugar and mace until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually beat in the egg yolks, then stir in 2 3/4 cups of flour alternately with bourbon.
4. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup flour over the cherries and toss. Stir this into the cake batter along with pecans.
5. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in the remaining 1 cup sugar, continuing to beat until very stiff.
6. Fold the beaten egg whites into the cake batter and pour into the prepared pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Turn the cakes out onto a wire rack and let cool completely.
9. Wrap each cake tightly in cheesecloth soaked in bourbon and store in a cool place. The cake will keep for one month.
